name: Zucchini Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until light.
2. Gradually add sugar.
3. Sift dry ingredients together.
4. Add to egg-oil-sugar mixture and beat until smooth.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients.
6. Place batter in two buttered and floured loaf pans (8-1/2 inches x 4-1/4 inches).
7. Bake at 350 degrees for one hour.
